creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
The distfile source for wmgrabimage seems to be gone and a short search for a replacement wasn't very successful.

Fix: 

Maybe it's time to retire this port.

If someone wants to take over please do so else i would like to drop maintainership and put the port to rest.
How-To-Repeat: http://beefy3.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/91amd64-default/2014-01-23_15h56m33s/logs/wmGrabImage-0.72_7.log
